gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.content: This is your dashboard. You can customize this page to show relevant information for your organization.

onboarding.title: Create Your First Organization
onboarding.description: Get started by creating your first organization
onboarding.createOrgDescription: Add a new organization to your account.
onboarding.instructions: You need to create an organization to continue. Click the button below to get started.

onboardingForm.title: Create Your Organization
onboardingForm.description: Get started by creating your first organization. You can always create more later.
onboardingForm.locationDescription: Used for billing when you add a paid plan.
onboardingForm.billingEmailDescription: Invoices and receipts will be sent here when you add a paid plan.
onboardingForm.billingEmailDescriptionCreate: Each organization must use a different billing email. Invoices will be sent here.

validation.billingEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.billingEmailAlreadyUsed: An organization is already using this billing email. Please use another one.
